case_title: EFRAIN O BARRERA VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRERA, EFRAIN O AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
